_meta.keyKnowledge: We select, present and display our artworks and art practice in formal and informal settings.

_source.w: We select, present and display our artworks and art practice in formal and informal settings.
y: How we present our art affects how people experience and understand it.
Curating and displaying work teaches us to make thoughtful decisions about presentation.
Sharing our art practice — not just finished works — helps others understand our creative journey.
eg: We prepare artworks for display by measuring, framing and planning the layout.
We write artist statements or labels to help viewers understand our work.
We create a portfolio that documents our creative process from experiments to final piece.
We install an exhibition of our class's work in the school gallery or library.
We present our work digitally using photographs and documentation of our process.
We participate in formal critique sessions, discussing our own and others' work respectfully.
